epicBranches.description: Core orchestrator, workstream lifecycle, state management, audit, routing, and execution behavior

charter.summary: Keep Maverick's core orchestration reliable, durable, observable, and safe across workstream lifecycle, state, routing, and execution behavior.
bullets: Prioritize reliable AI workstreams, durable state, cost-controlled planning, verification, and production-safe lane promotion.
Use existing orchestrator patterns before adding new state or abstractions.
Preserve workstream history and never hide operator state transitions inside ad hoc Discord behavior.

docs.purpose: Durable Maverick project context and cross-epic operating model.
Control-plane epic scope, boundaries, and planning context.

epicBranches.description: Discord command UX, forum/thread routing, bot ownership, message formatting, buttons, and interaction flows

charter.summary: Make Discord the dependable operator surface for epic-thread workstreams, assistant replies, command feedback, and repair guidance.
bullets: Every workstream command must resolve through a configured epic/thread or fail with actionable repair help.
Keep replies concise, inspectable, and explicit about background work and next actions.
Preserve thread bindings by repairing stale state from config instead of trusting old DB values.

docs.purpose: Durable Maverick project context and cross-epic operating model.
Discord routing epic scope and UX rules.

epicBranches.description: Code-level assistant capabilities, memory plumbing, note handling, reminders, and model routing

charter.summary: Build assistant capabilities that reuse durable state, route model work intentionally, and avoid unnecessary context rebuilds.
bullets: Prefer deterministic state plumbing before agent calls.
Persist context, notes, reminders, and model outputs where future workstreams can reuse them.
Treat cost control and bounded context as product requirements, not afterthoughts.

docs.purpose: Durable Maverick project context and cross-epic operating model.
Assistant infrastructure epic scope and context model.

epicBranches.description: Worktree safety, branch policy, repo cleanup, bootstrap doctrine, and project git-management hardening

charter.summary: Keep Maverick-managed repos safe by enforcing epic branches, disposable workstreams, clean finish/promotion flows, and non-destructive cleanup.
bullets: Workstreams branch from epics, finish into epics, and promote epics explicitly to production.
Never delete durable epic branches or preserved workstream history.
Prefer branch audits and repair reports before mutation.

docs.purpose: Durable Maverick project context and cross-epic operating model.
Git hygiene epic branch and cleanup rules.

epicBranches.description: Windows/Linux bot deployment, runtime health, service restarts, CLI/runtime upgrades, and cross-host coordination

charter.summary: Keep Windows and Linux Maverick deployments restartable, observable, and consistent across shared config and state.
bullets: Treat bot restarts, health checks, and cross-host state as operational work requiring clear rollback.
Avoid host-specific drift in shared project/epic config.
Surface live health and ownership clearly in Discord and HTTP checks.

docs.purpose: Durable Maverick project context and cross-epic operating model.
Deployment operations epic scope and health model.

epicBranches.description: PipeWire delay-node transport and latency-application stability work

charter.summary: Improve the stability and predictability of SyncSonic's PipeWire delay-node transport and manual latency application without mixing in microphone automation or Wi-Fi feature work.
bullets: Start from foundation/neutral-minimal and keep the shared Bluetooth-only manual-delay baseline intact unless the task is explicitly about shared platform behavior.
Treat stripped PipeWire modules and historical branches as reference material only; do not merge broad experimental stacks wholesale into this lane.
Reintroduce advanced PipeWire behavior only when it serves a concrete validation purpose and has a Pi-backed evidence path.
Keep work focused on deterministic delay application, route creation/teardown, control-plane semantics, and transport stability.

docs.purpose: Shared SyncSonic branch, routing, and historical-source model for Maverick workstreams.
Durable lane scope, out-of-scope rules, and validation expectations for PipeWire stability work.
Reference queue of stripped PipeWire modules reserved for deliberate Epic 1 review.

epicBranches.description: Startup-only audible microphone calibration for end-to-end latency measurement

charter.summary: Add a startup-only microphone calibration flow that uses human-audible probe sounds to measure end-to-end latency and publish clean targets into the stable actuation path.
bullets: Start from foundation/neutral-minimal and reintroduce only the startup calibration pieces needed for this lane.
Keep startup audible calibration separate from runtime ultrasonic correction and from Wi-Fi speaker work.
Publish calibration targets through the shared control-plane and actuation boundary instead of bypassing the transport layer directly.
Do not claim success without Raspberry Pi validation evidence.

docs.purpose: Shared SyncSonic branch, routing, and historical-source model for Maverick workstreams.
Durable lane scope, out-of-scope rules, and validation expectations for startup microphone calibration.

epicBranches.description: Runtime ultrasonic measurement and correction while playback is active

charter.summary: Support runtime microphone-based correction using ultrasonic bursts while music is playing without disrupting the listening experience or bypassing the shared actuation boundary.
bullets: Start from foundation/neutral-minimal and keep runtime ultrasonic work isolated from startup calibration.
Reintroduce only the runtime measurement, correction, and UX pieces that belong to playback-time alignment.
Do not mix Wi-Fi speaker feature work into this lane unless it is a narrow dependency that is documented explicitly.
Do not claim success without Raspberry Pi validation evidence during live playback conditions.

docs.purpose: Shared SyncSonic branch, routing, and historical-source model for Maverick workstreams.
Durable lane scope, out-of-scope rules, and validation expectations for runtime ultrasonic auto-alignment.

epicBranches.description: Wi-Fi speaker discovery, playback, and manual alignment before automation

charter.summary: Make Wi-Fi speaker support operational as its own lane by proving discovery, connection, playback, and manual alignment behavior before coupling it to microphone-based automation.
bullets: Start from foundation/neutral-minimal and reintroduce only Wi-Fi-specific code for discovery, connection, playback, and manual latency handling.
Treat the fact that Wi-Fi playback has worked historically as useful context, not as proof that Bluetooth synchronization is solved.
Do not blend Wi-Fi speaker work with startup or runtime microphone automation until manual alignment behavior is understood and validated.
Do not claim success without Raspberry Pi validation evidence.

docs.purpose: Shared SyncSonic branch, routing, and historical-source model for Maverick workstreams.
Durable lane scope, out-of-scope rules, and validation expectations for Wi-Fi speaker work.

epicBranches.description: Portfolio website content, project pages, screenshots, visual polish, project cards, and public-facing narrative

charter.summary: Keep the public portfolio site clean, current, simple, and useful as career proof for recruiters, managers, and technical peers.
bullets: All projects should look maintained and intentional; current and classic work may appear higher but there should be no neglected archive.
Astra is the public name for Netwise; use Netwise only for internal repo/config references.
Optimize for clear project proof, tasteful polish, and authenticity over gimmicks.

docs.purpose: Portfolio & Resume project-level context.
Portfolio website epic context and project presentation rules.

epicBranches.description: Resume PDF/content updates, role descriptions, accomplishments, bullets, formatting, and export-ready resume work

charter.summary: Maintain official resume and cover-letter materials from a master experience inventory, with tailored outputs for software engineering job applications.
bullets: The resume epic is a document/career-material lane, not a portfolio website coding lane.
Share career facts with the portfolio, but optimize for concise official application materials.
Tailored resumes and cover letters should select from durable inventory instead of starting from scratch.

docs.purpose: Portfolio & Resume project-level context.
Resume epic context, tailoring policy, and output rules.
Durable source of career facts, accomplishments, and tailoring inputs.

metadata.description: Portfolio website and resume refresh workspace for presenting recent projects, work experience, and proof artifacts
metadata.project_naming: For portfolio content, use Astra as the public-facing project name for the configured netwise project. Netwise, Sentry, and Astra refer to the same local project lineage; the active repo is C:\Users\wimer\Desktop\Sentry\netwise.

epicBranches.description: Operational work notes and active tasks

charter.summary: Capture and organize strict notes-only job operations context without connecting to employer source code, protected systems, or secrets.
bullets: Use sanitized personal notes only.
Manager-safe summaries are allowed when they are redacted and based on stored notes.
Do not ingest employer code, protected implementation details, or secrets.

docs.purpose: Work project context and safety boundary.
Job operations notes epic context.

epicBranches.description: Business context deep dives and supporting notes

charter.summary: Build sanitized business-context understanding from personal notes and study so work decisions are better grounded.
bullets: Keep the lane notes-only and redacted.
Connect deep dives to smart-goal progress when useful.
Avoid employer-confidential details and protected systems.

docs.purpose: Work project context and safety boundary.
Business context deep-dive epic context.

epicBranches.description: Independent engineering learning and study notes

charter.summary: Track independent engineering learning, reading, and study notes as durable personal development context.
bullets: Connect learning notes to smart-goal progress when useful.
Keep study artifacts personal, organized, and reusable for future summaries.
Do not mix employer-confidential project details into learning notes.

docs.purpose: Work project context and safety boundary.
Engineering learning epic context.

metadata.description: Private work-note workspace for job progress, project notes, acceptance criteria, and active learning
metadata.work_smart_goal_business_description: Do a deep dive into facets of the business that come up through work to build stronger business understanding.
metadata.work_smart_goal_learning_description: Do independent software engineering reading, make notes on it, and keep track of active learning.
